name: Sample Drum
description: Dual-channel sample player and live recorder with 1V/oct pitch tracking, AD envelope, slicing, reverse and granular-style looping. Six encoders, two displays, micro-SD storage, and six freely assignable CV inputs.

controls.name: Encoder A / DATA
controls.description: Main data encoder for channel 1. Selects samples, edits values and confirms menu entries with click.
controls.detail: Click = enter/confirm · long press = sub-menu · doubles as primary navigator

controls.name: Encoder B
controls.description: Channel-1 parameter encoder — typically Start point / secondary edit depending on page.
controls.detail: Page-dependent · Start, Loop Start, Attack etc.

controls.name: Encoder C
controls.description: Channel-1 parameter encoder — typically End point / tertiary edit.
controls.detail: Page-dependent · End, Loop End, Decay etc.

controls.name: Encoder D / BACK
controls.description: Channel-2 data encoder. Click returns to previous menu page from any sub-menu.

controls.name: Encoder E
controls.description: Channel-2 parameter encoder mirroring B on channel 1.

controls.name: Encoder F
controls.description: Channel-2 parameter encoder mirroring C on channel 1.

controls.name: PLAY
controls.description: Manually trigger sample playback on both channels for auditioning without patching a trigger.

controls.name: SHIFT
controls.description: Secondary function button. Held with encoders/TRG buttons to reach deeper menu pages, CV-assign and recording modes.
controls.detail: SHIFT + TRG = mode per channel · SHIFT + encoder = fine edit on many pages

controls.name: TRG1
controls.description: Channel-1 manual trigger button. Doubles as channel-select in global menus.

controls.name: TRG2
controls.description: Channel-2 manual trigger button. Doubles as channel-select in global menus.

inputs.name: TRIG 1
inputs.description: Trigger/gate input for channel 1. Behaviour depends on selected play mode (trigger one-shot, gated loop, etc.).

inputs.name: CV1 (ch 1)
inputs.description: Assignable CV input for channel 1. Route to Tune, Sample Select, Start, End, Loop, Attack, Decay, Play Mode etc. with per-input attenuator.

inputs.name: CV2 (ch 1)
inputs.description: Second assignable CV input for channel 1.

inputs.name: CV3 (ch 1)
inputs.description: Third assignable CV input for channel 1. Commonly used as 1V/oct pitch when CV1 is assigned to Tune.

inputs.name: CV1 (ch 2)
inputs.description: Assignable CV input for channel 2, same parameter menu as channel 1.

inputs.name: CV2 (ch 2)
inputs.description: Second assignable CV input for channel 2.

inputs.name: CV3 (ch 2)
inputs.description: Third assignable CV input for channel 2.

outputs.name: OUT A
outputs.description: Mono audio output for channel 1 after VCA, envelope and realtime effect.

outputs.name: OUT B
outputs.description: Mono audio output for channel 2 after VCA, envelope and realtime effect.

behaviors.name: Play modes
behaviors.description: Each channel selects among multiple play modes: one-shot trigger, gated playback, loop, reverse and granular-style fragment looping scanning Start/End points.

behaviors.name: Live sample recording
behaviors.description: Records incoming audio from OUT jacks used as inputs (per-channel) directly to micro-SD at 44.1 kHz, immediately playable and sliceable.

behaviors.name: Slicing
behaviors.description: Manual slice placement on loaded samples; no transient detection. Slices are recallable as individual trigger targets via CV-assigned Sample Select.

behaviors.name: 1V/oct pitch tracking
behaviors.description: Assigning a CV input to Tune enables chromatic playback across several octaves, turning the module into a melodic sample voice.

behaviors.name: AD envelope + virtual VCA
behaviors.description: Each channel has an AD envelope feeding a virtual VCA. Attack and Decay edit on dedicated page; CV-assignable for per-hit dynamics.

behaviors.name: Realtime effects
behaviors.description: Per-channel realtime effect (bit-crush/filter/etc. depending on firmware) applied post-playback before the output, adjustable without external processing.

behaviors.name: Preset save/load
behaviors.description: Save complete module state (samples, assignments, parameters) as a preset on the SD card and recall during performance.

behaviors.name: CV input assignment
behaviors.description: Each of the three CV inputs per channel can be routed to any parameter (Tune, Sample Select, Start, End, Loop, Attack, Decay, Play Mode) with dedicated attenuator.

patchIdeas.name: Dual drum voice
patchIdeas.patch: Clock sequencer → TRIG1 & TRIG2 · different one-shot samples per channel · OUT A/B → mixer
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Trigger
* Ch2 Mode: Trigger
- Seq (Trig1) t> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Seq (Trig2) t> Sample Drum (TRIG 2)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Mixer (Ch1)
- Sample Drum (OUT B) -> Mixer (Ch2)

patchIdeas.name: Melodic chromatic sample
patchIdeas.patch: Quantizer → CV3 (assigned Tune) · sequencer gate → TRIG1 · short decay
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 CV3: Tune (1V/oct)
* Ch1 Mode: Trigger
- Quant (CV) p> Sample Drum (CV3 ch1)
- Seq (Gate) g> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> VCF (In)

patchIdeas.name: Granular texture loop
patchIdeas.patch: Long sample · Gate into TRIG1 for loop · LFO → CV1 (Start) · LFO → CV2 (End)
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Loop
* Ch1 CV1: Start
* Ch1 CV2: End
- Gate (Out) g> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- LFO1 (Out) >> Sample Drum (CV1 ch1)
- LFO2 (Out) >> Sample Drum (CV2 ch1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Reverb (In)

patchIdeas.name: Reverse hit with CV morph
patchIdeas.patch: Trigger → TRIG1 · play mode Reverse · Env → CV1 (Decay) for dynamic tails
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Reverse
* Ch1 CV1: Decay
- Trig (Out) t> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Trig (Out) t> Env (Trig)
- Env (Out) >> Sample Drum (CV1 ch1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Live loop slice-and-rearrange
patchIdeas.patch: Record 1-bar loop via SHIFT+record · slice at beats · random CV → CV1 (Sample Select) · clock → TRIG1
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Trigger
* Ch1 CV1: Sample Select
- Clock (Out) c> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Random (Out) >> Sample Drum (CV1 ch1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Gated loop with dynamic window
patchIdeas.patch: Long gate → TRIG1 · Loop mode · LFO → CV1 (Start) keeps playhead moving · manual End
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Loop
* Ch1 CV1: Start
- Gate (Out) g> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- LFO (Out) >> Sample Drum (CV1 ch1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo sample pair
patchIdeas.patch: Same trigger to both channels · different samples/start points · OUT A/B = hard stereo
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 Mode: Trigger
* Ch2 Mode: Trigger
- Trig (Out) t> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Trig (Out) t> Sample Drum (TRIG 2)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Mixer (L)
- Sample Drum (OUT B) -> Mixer (R)

patchIdeas.name: CV-swept play mode
patchIdeas.patch: Stepped CV → CV1 (assigned Play Mode) jumps mode on each new note, clocked trigger
patchIdeas.diagram:
SAMPLE DRUM:
* Ch1 CV1: Play Mode
- Seq (CV) >> Sample Drum (CV1 ch1)
- Clock (Out) c> Sample Drum (TRIG 1)
- Sample Drum (OUT A) -> Mixer (In)
